ValidationRule.description: Billing Rate and Carrier Rate must be set when load transitions to quoted status or beyond.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status__c))), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "quoted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "tendered"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "accepted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "dispatched"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "in_transit"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "delivered"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "pod_captured"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "invoiced"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "settled"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "completed") ), OR(ISBLANK(Billing_Rate__c), ISBLANK(Carrier_Rate__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Both Billing Rate and Carrier Rate are required before quoting a load.
